description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:9.11.1 Docker image and runs 'yarn install' as a before_script for all jobs. Define two stages, test and deploy. In the test stage add a test job that caches the node_modules/ directory and executes 'yarn test-ci'. In the deploy stage add a pages job that also caches node_modules/, runs 'yarn build', publishes the generated 'public' folder as a pages artifact. Configure the pages job to run only on the master branch.
